channel.title: WalletLens Blog
channel.description: Guides on tracking your net worth and managing crypto, stocks, gold and cash — from WalletLens, the free private all-asset portfolio tracker.

item.title: How to Stress-Test Your Investment Portfolio Before a Crash
item.description: Learn how to stress-test your portfolio against market crashes before they happen, so you can protect gains and sleep at night.

item.title: How to Import Your Crypto Portfolio by Voice — No Typing Required
item.description: WalletLens lets you log trades just by speaking. This guide shows you how voice import works, what phrases it understands, and why it is the fastest way to keep a portfolio up to date.

item.title: How to Import a Portfolio From a Screenshot in Seconds
item.description: WalletLens can read a screenshot of any exchange, broker or wallet app and turn it into a tracked portfolio automatically. This guide explains how it works and which apps are supported.

item.title: How to Export Your Crypto Portfolio to Excel (Free, No Account)
item.description: WalletLens lets you download your full portfolio — holdings, cost basis, P&L, allocation — as a CSV file compatible with Excel and Google Sheets. Free, instant, no sign-up.

item.title: How to Generate a Crypto Tax Report for Free (No Account Needed)
item.description: You need accurate transaction records to file a crypto tax return. WalletLens exports a complete transaction history CSV — free, no account — that you can hand to your accountant or import into Koinly or CoinTracker.

item.title: How to Rebalance a Crypto and Stock Portfolio (Step by Step)
item.description: Learn what portfolio rebalancing means, when to do it, and a practical step-by-step method for crypto, stocks, and other assets in 2026.

item.title: Best Free Crypto Portfolio Trackers With No Account (2026)
item.description: A practical comparison of free crypto portfolio trackers you can use without creating an account — the privacy trade-offs, what to look for, and how the no-signup options actually differ.

item.title: How to Track Crypto and Stocks Together in One Portfolio
item.description: Most people hold crypto, stocks, and some cash or gold — but track each in a separate app and never see the whole picture. Here is how to view your true net worth across every asset class in one place.

item.title: Crypto Tax Basics: What Beginners Need to Know
item.description: A plain-English introduction to how crypto is taxed in most countries — taxable events, cost basis, holding periods, and why good record-keeping matters long before tax season.

item.title: RSI and MACD Explained: Reading Two Core Crypto Indicators
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to the two most-cited technical indicators — RSI and MACD — what they measure, how to read them, and the traps that catch new traders.

item.title: What Is the Magic Indicator? Five Signals in One Direction
item.description: How WalletLens condenses technical analysis, on-chain flow, volume, whale activity, and fundamentals into a single direction and confidence score per crypto holding.

item.title: The Best Free Net Worth Tracker for 2026
item.description: How to track your complete net worth — crypto, stocks, gold, and cash — in one free app, what to look for in a net worth tracker, and how the no-account options compare.

item.title: How to Calculate Your Net Worth (Step by Step)
item.description: A clear, step-by-step method for calculating your net worth — what counts as an asset, what counts as a liability, and how to track the number over time.

item.title: Net Worth Tracker vs Spreadsheet: Which Should You Use?
item.description: Spreadsheets are free and flexible, but they go stale. Here is an honest comparison of tracking your net worth in a spreadsheet versus a dedicated tracker.

item.title: Free Alternatives to Empower, Kubera & Personal Capital
item.description: Empower (Personal Capital) and Kubera are popular net worth trackers, but they come with accounts, account-linking, or subscription fees. Here are the free, private alternatives and how to choose.

item.title: How to Calculate Crypto Profit and ROI (The Simple Formula)
item.description: Learn the exact formulas for crypto profit, ROI, and break-even — plus how cost basis and DCA affect your real returns.

item.title: Bitcoin Portfolio Tracker — Track BTC Free, No Sign-Up
item.description: How to track your Bitcoin holdings for free without connecting a wallet or exchange — see live P&L alongside your entire net worth.

item.title: How to Track Apple (AAPL) Stock for Free in Your Portfolio
item.description: Track your Apple stock position for free alongside crypto, gold, and other assets — no brokerage login required.

item.title: Gold and Silver Portfolio Tracker — Track Precious Metals for Free
item.description: Track your gold and silver holdings for free alongside crypto and stocks — see your precious metals P&L with live prices.

item.title: What Percentage of Your Portfolio Should Be Crypto?
item.description: How much crypto to hold in your investment portfolio — frameworks from conservative to aggressive, and how risk tolerance shapes the answer.

item.title: The Best Free Investment Tracker for Stocks, Crypto, and Gold (2026)
item.description: What to look for in a free investment portfolio tracker and why most popular options still have significant trade-offs.

item.title: How to Track Your ETF Portfolio for Free (S&P 500, QQQ, VOO)
item.description: How to track S&P 500 ETFs like SPY, QQQ, and VOO alongside crypto and other assets for a complete net-worth view.

item.title: How to Track Investments Without Giving Up Your Privacy
item.description: Why linking your brokerage and bank to a tracker creates real risks — and how a local-first approach gives you the same visibility without the exposure.

item.title: 5 Signs Your Investment Portfolio Needs Rebalancing
item.description: How to tell when your portfolio has drifted too far from your targets — and what to do about it without timing the market.

item.title: How to Build Your First Investment Portfolio and Track It Free
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to building a diversified first portfolio with index funds, crypto, and a gold allocation — and how to track it all for free.

item.title: How to Track Crypto Without Relying on Exchange Apps
item.description: Why exchange apps are poor portfolio trackers — and how to get a complete crypto portfolio view without connecting your accounts.

item.title: Precious Metals vs Crypto: Which to Hold (and How to Track Both)
item.description: Gold, silver, Bitcoin, and Ethereum compared as store-of-value assets — different risk profiles, different roles, and why many investors hold both.

item.title: How to Track NVIDIA, Apple, and Tech Stocks Alongside Crypto
item.description: Why a mixed tech-stock and crypto portfolio needs a single tracker — and how to set one up for free in under five minutes.

item.title: What Is ROI in Investing? How to Calculate It
item.description: ROI explained — the formula, what it means for different asset types, its limitations, and how to calculate it instantly.

item.title: Best Portfolio Tracker That Doesn't Require a Bank Login
item.description: Why some investors avoid bank-linked portfolio trackers — and which free alternatives give you the same visibility without the security and privacy trade-offs.

item.title: How to Track Unrealized Gains and Losses in Your Portfolio
item.description: Learn what unrealized gains and losses mean, how to calculate them, and the best free tools to track them across crypto, stocks, and gold.

item.title: Portfolio Vision Planning: Set Goals for Every Dollar
item.description: Learn how to split your net worth into purpose-driven buckets — emergency fund, long-term holds, and withdrawal plans — and track live progress toward each goal.

item.title: Crypto Withdrawal Strategy: How to Plan a Sustainable Drawdown
item.description: A step-by-step guide to planning when and how to withdraw from your crypto portfolio — without running out too soon or leaving too much on the table.

item.title: How to Split Your Net Worth Into Goals (and Actually Stick to Them)
item.description: Stop treating your portfolio as one big number. This guide shows how to divide your net worth into goal-based buckets that give every dollar a purpose and keep you disciplined.

item.title: How to Track Your Investment Portfolio in Multiple Currencies
item.description: Holding assets in USD, EUR, GBP, or crypto? Learn how to track your full portfolio net worth across multiple currencies accurately and for free.

item.title: How to Read a Portfolio Allocation Chart (And Act on It)
item.description: Learn how to read a portfolio allocation chart, understand what your asset mix is telling you, and use it to make smarter rebalancing decisions.

item.title: How to Track Your Crypto Portfolio for Free in 2026
item.description: A complete guide to tracking Bitcoin, Ethereum, and altcoin holdings without paying for a subscription or giving up your private keys.

item.title: What Is a Bitcoin Whale Transaction? (And Why It Matters)
item.description: Large Bitcoin transactions — often called "whale moves" — can signal shifts in market sentiment. Here's how to spot them and what they might mean for price.

item.title: The Fear & Greed Index for Crypto: What It Is and How to Use It
item.description: The Fear & Greed Index is one of the most watched sentiment indicators in crypto. Learn what drives it, how to read it, and how WalletLens calculates a personalised version for your own portfolio.

item.title: How to Diversify Your Portfolio Across Crypto, Stocks, and Gold
item.description: Diversification across asset classes reduces risk without necessarily reducing returns. Here's a practical framework for balancing crypto, equities, and hard assets.

item.title: How to Set Crypto Profit Targets (And Actually Stick to Them)
item.description: Most crypto investors buy well but sell poorly — either too early or, more often, too late. A systematic profit-taking plan removes emotion from the decision.

item.title: Dollar-Cost Averaging in Crypto: A Complete Beginner’s Guide
item.description: Dollar-cost averaging removes the impossible task of timing the market by spreading your buys over time. Here is how DCA works, when it beats lump-sum investing, and how to track it accurately.

item.title: How to Calculate Your Crypto Cost Basis and Profit/Loss
item.description: Your cost basis determines your real profit, your break-even price, and your tax bill. Here is how average cost works, how it differs from FIFO, and how to track it without a spreadsheet.

item.title: Stablecoins Explained: USDT, USDC, and Why They Are Dry Powder
item.description: Stablecoins are the backbone of crypto trading, but they behave nothing like Bitcoin. Here is what backs them, the risks to watch, and why your tracker should treat them as cash rather than profit.

item.title: Gold vs Bitcoin: Comparing Two Stores of Value
item.description: Bitcoin is often called "digital gold," but the two assets differ in supply, volatility, and history. Here is an even-handed comparison to help you decide how each fits a diversified portfolio.

item.title: Understanding Crypto Market Cycles and the Bitcoin Halving
item.description: Crypto moves in dramatic boom-and-bust cycles that rhyme with the Bitcoin halving. Knowing the four phases of a cycle can keep you from buying euphoria and selling despair.

item.title: Position Sizing and Risk Management for Volatile Assets
item.description: Survival is the prerequisite for returns. Learn how position sizing, concentration limits, and a simple risk framework keep a single bad bet from wiping out your portfolio.

item.title: What Is Net Worth and How to Calculate Yours
item.description: Net worth is the single most important number in your financial life. Here is what it means, how to calculate it accurately, and why most people get it wrong.

item.title: How to Grow Your Net Worth: A Practical Framework
item.description: Growing net worth is not about earning more — it is about the gap between what you build and what you owe. Here is a practical framework that works across income levels.

item.title: How to Track Your Net Worth Across Crypto, Stocks, Gold, and Cash
item.description: Your financial picture is scattered across wallets, brokerages, bank accounts, and metal holdings. Here is how to bring it all into one live net worth view without spreadsheets or subscriptions.

item.title: Is It Safe to Connect Your Exchange API to a Portfolio Tracker?
item.description: Thinking about linking your exchange API to a portfolio tracker? Learn the real risks, what to check, and safer alternatives before you connect.
